hero.headline: Fullstack Developer building enterprise systems that
hero.sub: I architect MERN and C#/.NET solutions: DGII invoicing, e-commerce, SaaS and REST APIs with JWT security, RBAC and AI-accelerated delivery.

about.title: I turn ideas into robust digital solutions.
about.bio: Results-driven Fullstack Developer, 25 years old, with more than 5 years building software for businesses: enterprise web systems, SaaS platforms and robust digital solutions. Expert in the MERN stack and the C#/.NET ecosystem. I deliver DGII-compliant electronic invoicing, e-commerce, raffle engines, university REST APIs and private lending apps — always with clean architecture, JWT, RBAC and scalable APIs.
about.bio2: I actively integrate Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Cursor and Antigravity into daily workflows to raise quality and speed.

highlights.title: Problem solving
highlights.desc: Logical, efficient approach to complex systems.

highlights.title: Client focus
highlights.desc: C-Level communication and real business value.

points: End-to-end enterprise web systems for corporate clients in DR
Design and implementation of end-to-end ERP systems (inventory, invoicing, DR payroll, reporting)
Software code and process audits — technical reviews, tech debt and security hardening
Quality & information security: OWASP Top 10, JWT + RBAC, encryption and role-based access control
REST APIs with Node/Express and C#/ASP.NET Core; MongoDB and SQL Server
SaaS: FactP, private lending, GoPrize.SDQ, e-commerce
JWT + refresh-token rotation + RBAC + barcode scanning
AI for code review and automation (−35% delivery time)
Pixel-perfect responsive UIs with React, Angular, HTML5/CSS3/SCSS, TypeScript
E-commerce: cart, coupons, PayPal + bank transfer, emails, province shipping
Redux, Context API and Git/GitHub in multidisciplinary teams
Data curation and validation in relational databases
Executive reports, dashboards and server administration
Frontend with HTML5, Tailwind CSS and vanilla JavaScript

services.title: Services I provide
services.subtitle: Enterprise-grade digital solutions from Logic Code Spot Software Solutions.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Modern websites and apps built with React, Next.js and TypeScript, optimized for speed and SEO. Responsive, accessible interfaces ready to scale from day one.

items.title: Backend Development
items.desc: Robust REST APIs and microservices with Node.js, Express and .NET, designed for performance and security. Scalable architecture with JWT auth, rate limiting and full documentation.

items.title: E-commerce Solutions
items.desc: Scalable online stores with payment gateways, inventory management and real-time admin dashboards. A smooth, secure shopping experience optimized for conversion.

items.title: Enterprise Systems
items.desc: Custom invoicing, ERP and dashboards that digitize and automate your company's internal processes. Robust, secure solutions tailored to your real workflow.

items.title: AI Agents for Business
items.desc: Design and development of custom AI agents that automate repetitive tasks and strengthen decision-making. Integration with Claude, GPT and Gemini under a multi-provider approach.

items.title: Systems Audit & ERP
items.desc: Technical software audits, custom ERP implementation and security hardening to protect your infrastructure. We identify vulnerabilities and optimize system performance.

work.title: Featured projects
work.subtitle: Real products shipped for businesses and users in the Dominican Republic.

items.title: FactP
items.summary: Electronic invoicing app with DGII fiscal compliance, NCF series and multi-user management.
features: NCF series management and XSD schema validation
Custom animated loading screen and admin profile panel

items.title: Fashion Store
items.summary: Online store with catalog, cart, wishlist, coupons and dual checkout.

items.title: GoPrize.SDQ
items.summary: Raffle platform with premium UX, 3D animations and automated notifications.
features: Automatic winner selection via Cron Jobs

items.title: University REST API
items.summary: University REST API with full CRUD, JWT auth and role-based authorization.
features: CRUD: teachers, students, courses, enrollments and grades
